channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Office Dog – “Front Row Seat”
item.description: 🎶 Pump up your playlist with @OfficeDog's new track "Front Row Seat"! 🐾🎸 #NewMusicAlert #OfficeDog #FrontRowSeat

item.title: Rise Against Announce Fall 2026 US Tour with Alkaline Trio
item.description: 🎸 Pump up the volume! @riseagainst just dropped tour dates with @Alkaline_Trio coming to a city near you! 🎶 #MusicNews #TourAnnouncement

item.title: St. Vincent announces new live album & more orchestral tour dates, NYC’s Lincoln Center included
item.description: 🎶 Exciting news alert: Get ready for more @St_Vincent live magic and orchestra vibes coming your way, including a stop at NYC's Lincoln Center! 🤩 #StVincent #LiveAlbum

item.title: Paul McCartney Announces Intimate Two-Night Stand in Los Angeles
item.description: 🎸 Paul McCartney brings legendary vibes to LA with a two-night extravaganza! Who's snagging tickets? 🌟 #PaulMcCartney #MusicNews

item.title: Rosalía Delivers Stunning Visual Storytelling in ‘Lux’ Tour Opener
item.description: ✨ Step into the mesmerizing world of @rosalia’s ‘Lux’ tour! 🎶🌟 #MusicMagic #RosalíaTourKickoff
